summary: Plan-only inventory classification for five open PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly identifies this as a live PR inventory shard rather than a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or raise-PR mutation is recommended.

actions.reason: Focused open bug-fix PR with supplied proof and passing checks; not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate in this inventory shard.
Standalone automation/config PR; no shared canonical, duplicate, superseding PR, or low-signal close permission is present.
Focused memory-core PR appears reviewable on its own, but correctness/merge judgment remains outside this plan-mode inventory cleanup job.
Substantive feature PR with failing proof/type checks and waiting-on-author status; keep separate for author/maintainer follow-up.
Draft focused availability-adjacent PR lacking proof; keep independent and avoid closeout because low-signal close is disabled and the PR is not shown to be duplicate or superseded.
